-- hierarchical[0] --

    (Property) UserRepository.Default detail="<UserRepository, never, Cache | DbConnection>" range=24:3-24:49 selection=24:3-24:49

    (Variable) simplePipeIn detail="<UserRepository, never, DbConnection | FileSystem>" range=29:14-29:86 selection=29:14-29:86
    (Variable) liveWithPipeable detail="<Cache | DbConnection | UserRepository, never, DbConnection | FileSystem>" range=31:14-34:2 selection=31:14-34:2
    (Variable) cacheWithFs detail="<Cache, never, never>" range=36:14-36:81 selection=36:14-36:81

-- flat[0] --
